query:
-- 查看卡片统计
SELECT c.id, c.deviceId, c.totalVotes, c.isCompleted, 
       COUNT(p.id) as photoCount,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM votes v WHERE v.cardId = c.id) as actualVotes
FROM cards c
LEFT JOIN photos p ON p.cardId = c.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.deviceId, c.totalVotes, c.isCompleted
ORDER BY c.id;
command:
